content.en:
Rumble!

The Forbidden Zerg army has arrived!

The Dao Ancestors made a move, facing the 12 million Forbidden Zerg army, and the two sides fought.

And the eight half-step domain ancestors also fought with the nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, among which the Qinglong Palace master alone fought against the two most powerful lord-level forbidden zergs, which blocked the nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg.

Ye Tian's body maintained the strength of the top supreme Dao Ancestor, did not cast a forbidden Dao technique, and even reserved all kinds of methods, trying not to be consistent with the methods of the Dark King.

And the Dark King doesn't need to care about anything, he is full of combat power, and he can kill an elite-level taboo zerg almost with one move.

"Die!"

Ye Tian held the Heaven Slaying Spear and slashed one Forbidden Zerg one after another, and his invincible posture crisscrossed this battlefield.

The elite-level taboo zerg couldn't stop Ye Tian, not to mention the ordinary taboo zerg, Ye Tian swept away a large area with one sweep, and not a single taboo zerg could survive at all.

The wisdom of the Forbidden Zerg is not stupid, knowing that no matter how many elite-level taboo Zerg and ordinary taboo Zerg can't stop Ye Tian at all, so he sent a commander-level taboo Zerg to kill Ye Tian, vowing to kill Ye Tian.

......

"Commander-level forbidden zerg!"

Ye Tian's eyes stared at the commander-level forbidden Zerg that was shuttling towards him not far away, clenched the Heaven Slaying Spear, and fought with it.

Rumble!!!

With a collision, Ye Tian flew upside down.

This commander-level forbidden zerg is not weak, and Ye Tian's strongest attack can't help him, and even in terms of attack level, it is weaker than the other party.

Soon, Ye Tian was injured, but the commander-level forbidden zerg was not injured.

However, Ye Tian was able to use the power of the forbidden origin to recover from his injuries, so it didn't matter.

But if he continues to fight like this, it is undoubtedly a waste of time, and if he can't kill the other party, it means that his combat power is wasted, and he can't kill more forbidden zergs.

"Gotta kill him!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It can kill a commander-level forbidden zerg, which is very difficult, not an ordinary difficulty.

Abrupt.

The Heaven Slaying Spear in Ye Tian's hand disappeared, and the next moment it appeared in a weak abdomen of the commander-level forbidden zerg, piercing its body with a single blow.

Then.

The commander-level forbidden zerg was very puzzled, and didn't understand why Ye Tian suddenly attacked its abdomen, but it didn't even sense it.

"Sure enough, it couldn't sense my shot!"

Ye Tian smiled.

This is the second forbidden Dao technique he created, it has just been created, strictly speaking, it is still a little imperfect, if it is forcibly cast, it will cause some damage to the body, but the damage is not large, and it can be repaired with the power of the forbidden origin.

Originally, he didn't want to use this forbidden dao technique that had not been completely created, but he really couldn't help this commander-level forbidden zerg, so he could only use it.

He gave this forbidden Dao technique a name, called the Shadow Thorn, which can attack silently, and its attack power is second only to the Dark Pole Spear.

However, the attack of the Dark Extreme Dao Spear was easy to be avoided or even resisted, while the Shadow Thorn was similar to the effect of the Forbidden Talent Concealment, and unless it was a half-step domain ancestor, there was no way to detect it at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian's blow worked, and the commander-level forbidden zerg couldn't dodge it at all, and was even directly attacked to the weakest point of his body, and was injured all of a sudden.

Soon, Ye Tian launched a second shadow thorn attack, once again attacking the weak point of the commander-level forbidden zerg's body, and injuring it again.

In this way, Ye Tian used the Shadow Thorn from time to time, making the commander-level forbidden Zerg's injuries more and more serious.

The commander-level forbidden zerg was also quite crazy, frantically attacking Ye Tian, constantly injuring Ye Tian, but Ye Tian could use the power of the forbidden origin to quickly recover from his injuries, and the commander-level forbidden zerg couldn't kill Ye Tian at all.

If it was other invincible Dao Ancestors, it was estimated that they would have to run away at this time, but this commander-level forbidden Zerg would not have thought about escaping at all before getting the order, and only thought about killing Ye Tian.

Time passed little by little, and it didn't take long for this commander-level forbidden zerg to be severely injured and dying.

Suddenly, Ye Tian burst out with a blow at the Dark Pole Dao Spear, this time, this commander-level forbidden zerg not only couldn't stop it, but even its defense power dropped a lot, and it couldn't bear it, and was directly pierced by Ye Tian's blow.

This blow completely made the commander-level forbidden zerg seriously injured and dying!

At this time, several elite-level forbidden zergs nearby seemed to want to come over to rescue this commander-level forbidden zerg, but Ye Tian attacked this commander-level forbidden zerg at a faster speed.

Just when those elite-level forbidden zergs arrived, Ye Tian had already completely killed this commander-level forbidden zerg.

Immediately, Ye Tian collected the corpse of this commander-level forbidden zerg, and cast another shadow thorn, found a tricky angle, and hit the shadow thorn with one blow, directly penetrating all those elite-level forbidden zergs with one blow, killing the other party in seconds.

At this time.

Ye Tian did not continue to fight, but seized the time to recover from his injuries.

In order to kill the forbidden zerg, his injuries were not light, and his recovery speed has not been able to keep up with the speed of injury, and although the injuries on his body are not serious, they are not light.

Therefore, he wanted to completely recover from his injuries so that he could better kill the other forbidden zergs.

And the picture of Ye Tian killing the commander-level forbidden Zerg was also captured by many supreme Dao ancestors nearby, and they fell into horror one by one.

The Supreme Dao Ancestor killed the commander-level forbidden Zerg, which is equivalent to the Supreme Dao Ancestor killing the invincible Dao Ancestor, it is simply against the sky!

"He's stronger!"

Heavenly Emperor Palace Yan Ancestor's eyes were shocked.

Before, Ye Tian's stealth was very terrifying, and it was impossible to guard against it, but if he made a move after stealth, he would also reveal his figure, and he still had enough time to react, but the five people at the beginning couldn't cooperate with each other to resist.

But this time, Ye Tian's attack, he also saw it, it was impossible to defend against it at all, it was impossible to dodge, and the moment he made his move, he attacked the body of the commander-level forbidden zerg, this method was too terrifying.

If Ye Tianhui had made this move, he and the other four Supreme Dao Ancestors would probably have been defeated or even killed soon.

The other side.

Migu Daozu was fighting with a lord-level forbidden zerg, and suddenly two lord-level forbidden zergs appeared beside him.

It wasn't until he was very close that he sighed.

"Not good!"

Migu Daozu exclaimed.

Boom!!

The two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg launched an attack in an instant, and the two long feet instantly pierced the defense on the Migu Dao Ancestor's body, hitting one of his defensive forbidden armors, causing the Migu Dao Ancestor to retreat in blood.

Then, the three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg surrounded him and launched a siege again!

At this moment, Migu Daozu's situation was very dangerous.
